free_text: Fast neutron cross sections in the 2S-1d shell
Samples are contained in an aluminum cylinder, and
range in thickness from 0.12 to 0.2 atoms/b.
to be consistent within a 30% uncertainty.
Statistical error in data ranges from
2% at incident neutron energy of 1 MeV to about 10%
